title: Yokohama, Kanagawa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Yokohama, Kanagawa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Yokohama is a city in Kanagawa with a population of 3,777,000. Japan’s second-largest city with a stunning harbor, vibrant Chinatown, and a relaxed coastal atmosphere just south of Tokyo.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
